'''Toklar''' was a famous [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Philosopher/Legends|philosopher]]. He was active seven [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="NEGTC" />

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] took Toklar's philosophies to heart, and found the following particularly inspirational:
:''"Greed has no limits, envy no boundaries, in the heart of a petty man."''
:''"One sting is remembered longer than a thousand caresses."''
:''"The tide will slacken, the whirlpool will shrink, the krakana will cower. Such is the power of a focused individual."''

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
